archetype: Archetype 7: Electric & Neon (Refined to Neo-Glass High-End)
rationale: The user explicitly requested a dark background with cyan shades, glow, and modern effects. To elevate this beyond standard 'cyberpunk', we are merging it with Archetype 5 (Premium Glassmorphism). This creates a 'Neo-Glass' aesthetic: deep void black backgrounds, optical clarity frosted glass, and precise cyan rim lighting. This communicates a futuristic yet professional high-tech command center vibe suited for personal productivity.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with Asymmetry. Mobile-first grid.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. Never cram text to the edges.
spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: Control Room Grid for the dashboard (Density, Data Correlation).
spacing_and_layout.mobile_nav: Fixed bottom navigation bar with a glassmorphic background (`backdrop-blur-xl`, `bg-[#050505]/60`, `border-t border-white/10`). Icons must be distinctly spaced and easily tappable.

surfaces.glass_card: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0F0F14]/40 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-3xl
surfaces.glowing_card: relative group overflow-hidden rounded-3xl backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505] border border-[#00E5FF]/20 hover:border-[#00E5FF]/50 transition-colors duration-500 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.05)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,229,255,0.15)]
surfaces.ai_suggestion_card: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#00E5FF]/10 to-transparent border border-[#00E5FF]/30 rounded-2xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden. Use a moving radial gradient background for the 'Tracing Beam' effect.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,229,255,0.5)] hover:bg-[#66F0FF] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary_glass: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-[#00E5FF]/50 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4

inputs.text: bg-[#050505] border-b-2 border-white/10 text-white rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors w-full placeholder:text-white/20 text-lg
inputs.checkbox: peer h-6 w-6 shrink-0 rounded border border-white/20 bg-transparent focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#00E5FF] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#050505] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=checked]:bg-[#00E5FF] data-[state=checked]:text-black

icons.style: Thin or Regular weight, strictly functional. Tints should match state (e.g., #00E5FF for active).

motion.hover: All interactive elements must have a subtle scale up (`hover:scale-[1.02]`) and border/glow color shift.
motion.page_transitions: Fade in with a slight upward translation (`translate-y-4` to `translate-y-0`) using Framer Motion.
motion.lists: Staggered entrance animations for task lists and habits.

hero_background.description: Abstract image with a dark dynamic tunnel effect in blue tones, conveying motion and depth. Use as a subtle background behind the main dashboard or login screen with low opacity (10-20%) to avoid competing with UI elements.

secondary_texture.description: Abstract blue and purple light streaks. Good for the AI Smart Suggestion card background or onboarding screens.

user_avatar.description: User profile avatar for the settings/header section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme with `#050505` base background. Do not use generic gray backgrounds like `bg-gray-900`.

For the Glassmorphism effect, always pair `backdrop-blur-xl` or `backdrop-blur-2xl` with a highly transparent background (e.g., `bg-white/5` or `bg-black/40`) AND a delicate 1px border (`border-white/10`). Without the border, the glass effect fails.
Apply cyan glows (`#00E5FF`) sparingly. Use it for primary CTAs, active states, Pomodoro timer progress rings, and AI task suggestions. Overusing it will dilute the premium feel.
Use Phosphor Icons (`yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`) for all iconography to maintain a clean, high-tech, thin-line aesthetic.
For the bottom navigation bar (since this is mobile-first), use a fixed glassmorphic panel at the bottom of the screen with clear icon spacing.
Implement the Time Blocking schedule view using CSS Grid (`grid-cols-[auto_1fr]`). The left column for time labels, the right for draggable task blocks.
Use Framer Motion (`yarn add framer-motion`) for smooth task list staggering, timer countdowns, and micro-interactions.
Ensure the AI Smart Task Suggestion stands out by using a subtle animated gradient border or a glowing background mesh (use the secondary_texture image URL provided, clipped to the card).
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='add-task-btn'`).
Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for body text; use `#A1A1AA` to reduce eye strain, reserving pure white only for headings and active states.
Do not use TS/TSX syntax. Only implement in plain Javascript (.jsx/.js files).
Customize the Shadcn calendar component for habit streaks, removing generic borders and utilizing cyan active states instead.
Customize the Pomodoro timer UI to look like a high-tech glowing ring, leveraging SVG with stroke-dasharray animations.
